date.description: Ending date for the period requested expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format.

fsymId.description: FactSet Entity Identifier. Six alpha-numeric characters, excluding vowels, with a -E suffix (XXXXXX-E).

requestId.description: Identifier that was used for the request.

scoreType.description: The name of the specific SDG Score type being shown in the response. This will be represented by the scoreTypes input: PULSE, INSIGHT, MOMENTUM, ART_VOL_TTM, CAT_VOL_TTM, or DYNAMIC_MAT.
